channel.title: Interactive Exercises on LiaScript
channel.description: Recent content in Interactive Exercises on LiaScript

item.title: Chat-Simulation for LiaScript: Bring Dialogues to Life in Your Course
item.description: Sometimes the most effective way to present information is not as a list or an explanation, but as a conversation. The Chat-Simulation template lets you embed animated chat dialogues directly in your LiaScript course — complete with typing indicators, speech bubbles, and support for full Markdown and LiaScript elements inside every message.

item.title: ExplainGit for LiaScript: Visualize Git Repositories Interactively
item.description: Git is notoriously difficult to teach with text alone. The ExplainGit template embeds onlywei’s explain-git-with-d3 into LiaScript, visualizing commits, branches, merges, and checkouts as animated D3 diagrams.

item.title: PouchDB for LiaScript: NoSQL Documents and Mango Queries in the Browser
item.description: Relational databases are one way to store data. Documents are another. The PouchDB template brings PouchDB — a JavaScript database inspired by Apache CouchDB — directly into your LiaScript courses.

item.title: SpreadSheet for LiaScript: Excel-Style Interactive Tables in Your Course
item.description: Interactive data tables are a staple of business, science, and data literacy education. The SpreadSheet template brings JSSpreadsheet (jspreadsheet.js) into LiaScript, enabling student-editable tables with Excel-style formulas, dropdown selectors, checkboxes, sorting, search, and persistence — all without a server.

item.title: TextAnalysis for LiaScript: Readability Scores and Text Complexity Metrics
item.description: Writing clear learning materials requires understanding how readable they actually are. The TextAnalysis template attaches standard readability metrics to any text block in LiaScript. Students can paste or edit text and instantly see Flesch-Kincaid grades, Gunning Fog index, syllable counts, reading time, and more — directly in the course slide.

item.title: AlaSQL for LiaScript: Teach SQL and Query CSV Data in the Browser
item.description: SQL is not only for relational databases. With the AlaSQL template, you can run SQL queries inside LiaScript courses against in-memory tables, JavaScript arrays, and CSV files — entirely in the browser.

item.title: CollaborativeDrawing for LiaScript: Shared Whiteboards for Live Classrooms
item.description: When you teach a live session, sometimes the most natural thing is to hand students a marker and say: “draw what you see.” The CollaborativeDrawing template brings that experience into LiaScript — a shared canvas where every connected student draws in their own randomly assigned color, all changes synchronize in real time across all participants.

item.title: Speech-Recognition-Quiz for LiaScript: Turn Spoken Words into Interactive Quizzes
item.description: What if your quiz asked learners to say the answer instead of typing it?

item.title: SQLite for LiaScript: Teach SQL Interactively in the Browser
item.description: SQL is the foundational language of data. With the SQLite template, you can teach it interactively — learners write real SQL, run it immediately, and see the results as formatted tables, right inside the course.
